allow: PowerShell($env:NUXT_PUBLIC_INSFORGE_URL="http://localhost"; $env:NUXT_PUBLIC_INSFORGE_ANON_KEY="x"; $p = Start-Process node -ArgumentList ".output/server/index.mjs" -PassThru -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\jderr.txt" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\jdout.txt"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000/find-jobs/test-id-123" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $hasBack = $r.Content -match 'Back to Jobs'; Write-Output "Contains 'Back to Jobs': $hasBack" } catch { Write-Output "ERR: $_" } finally { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force; Write-Output "Killed PID $\($_.OwningProcess\)" } catch {} }; Write-Output "done")
